global_rules.interactions: Hover states must be lighter hues, focus states must have high contrast rings. Add aria-hidden to decorative elements. Ensure data-testid is present on all interactable elements.

elegant.style: Cream, gold, white. Premium serif fonts. Mewah dan klasik. Heavy use of romantic floral ornaments and gold filigree. Classic overlapping layout.

luxury.style: Black, gold, dark theme. Animasi premium. Eksklusif. Deep matte colors with digital metallic foil effects. Cinematic dark layout.

modern.style: Clean UI, minimal shadow, contemporary layout. Bold typography, asymmetry. The 'Editorial Future' look.

minimalist.style: Putih bersih, fokus tipografi, ringan. Geometric minimal lines, massive whitespace. High contrast text.

admin_panel.style: Premium dashboard-grade. Flat solid surfaces, dense compact spacing. Shadcn UI default logic but styled premium. Minimal rounded corners.

public_invitation.cover_screen: Full-bleed photo, dark overlay (bg-black/50 to bg-black/30). Must be cinematic. Elegant typography reveal using Framer Motion. 'Buka Undangan' starts music.
public_invitation.countdown: Minimalist grid or elegant pure typography.
public_invitation.profile: Groom & bride photos with shapes dictating the template style (arches for Elegant, sharp rectangles for Modern/Luxury). Large typography for names.
public_invitation.love_story: Vertical timeline. Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered revealing.
public_invitation.events: Akad + Resepsi displayed as high-end editorial cards.
public_invitation.gallery: Masonry grid with lightbox support. Images must zoom beautifully.
public_invitation.rsvp_wishes: Frictionless form using customized Shadcn elements.
public_invitation.gift: Bank transfer cards with elegant 'copy' buttons and toasts. QRIS download integration.

animations.scroll: MANDATORY: Lenis for smooth scrolling momentum.
animations.reveal: Framer Motion for stagger children, fade-in-up, and cover letter unboxing effects.
animations.parallax: Subtle parallax on hero images and deep gallery grids.

instructions_to_main_agent: READ THIS FIRST: Do not use generic fonts (e.g., Inter, Roboto). Implement the 4 distinct typography pairings (Italiana, Cormorant Garamond, Cabinet Grotesk, Marcellus) as listed.
Implement 4 separate CSS/Tailwind themes that dramatically alter the visual look (colors, font-families, and shapes/decorations).
Admin Panel should use standard Shadcn layouts but updated to look premium (subtle borders, flat colors, tight typography).
Public invitation must be Mobile-First and feature rich 'unboxing' or 'scroll-reveal' animations via framer-motion.
Always place a dark or gradient overlay over the cover image so the white text is readable (bg-black/40 min).
Every interactable button, link, and form input MUST contain a 'data-testid' attribute for testing.
Populate the site with the default seeded data (Ahnaf & Nabilla) as instructed.
Load images gracefully using standard performance best practices.
Include an audio element toggled by a floating music button.
